CustomField.description: Primary statutory or CFR citation for this permit type (e.g., "33 U.S.C. § 1344; 33 CFR Part 323"). Populated into nepa_required_permit__c.nepa_regulatory_citation__c at record creation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Primary statutory or CFR citation (e.g., 33 U.S.C. § 1344; 33 CFR Part 323).
CustomField.label: Regulatory Citation
